newsSince: Genuinely fresh bottleneck evidence: on June 18, 2026 SK hynix shipped 12-layer HBM4E samples to major customers (16Gbps/pin, >20% power efficiency gain). Trade press reaffirmed SK hynix holds ~70% of Nvidia's HBM4 (Vera Rubin) allocation, above the prior ~50% market estimate, and management/SK chairman flagged the HBM4 shortage worsening in H2 2026 with the global wafer shortage persisting to ~2030. Q1 2026 was already record (reported Apr 23).

verdicts.rankRationale: AI-node bottleneck lens: June 18 HBM4E 12-layer samples plus reaffirmed ~70% Nvidia HBM4 allocation and a worsening H2-2026 shortage genuinely strengthen the choke-point case vs June 9. But it's now ~$1T cap, 277% YTD, deeply crowded; fundamentals warrant only modest positive drift, not a re-rank.
verdicts.bull: Confirmed ~70% Nvidia HBM4 share; HBM4E samples out; HBM4 shortage worsens H2 2026; wafer scarcity to 2030.
verdicts.neutral: Bottleneck intact but consensus; price already embeds the supercycle.
verdicts.bear: ~$1T cap, 277% YTD, top funds piled in; residual alpha largely gone, memory cyclicality lurks.

verdicts.rankRationale: CPO lens: SK hynix is only an indirect cluster-scale proxy here. HBM4E sample news doesn't change its co-packaged-optics relevance, and at ~$1T cap heavily re-rated it should stay below purer, less-crowded CPO names. No change to the indirect-proxy thesis since June 9.
verdicts.bull: HBM remains a gating item for the AI clusters that pull CPO demand.
verdicts.neutral: Indirect proxy; CPO read-through unchanged by HBM4E news.
verdicts.bear: Not a CPO supplier; massive cap and YTD leave no asymmetry on this lens.

verdicts.rankRationale: Silicon-consumption basket: SK hynix remains the canonical direct HBM proxy and June 18 HBM4E samples plus the worsening shortage-to-2028+ backdrop reinforce that basket role. The page already took its re-rating discipline; fresh HBM evidence justifies only mild positive score drift, not a rank change.
verdicts.bull: Direct exposure to the fastest-growing silicon layer; shortage extends to 2030.
verdicts.neutral: Best-fit representative; already top-ranked on the theme.
verdicts.bear: Extreme re-rating; basket role doesn't immunize against a memory downcycle.

verdicts.rankRationale: Master under-owned-bottleneck list: HBM4E samples and ~70% Nvidia share confirm the thesis but SK hynix is now the opposite of under-owned — ~$1T cap, 277% YTD, top Wall Street funds crowding in. On this scarcity lens it should sit below less-rerated HBM-chain names (equipment, materials, test). Fundamentals net flat.
verdicts.bull: Strongest, most-confirmed AI-memory bottleneck exposure in the chain.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis intact but fully discovered by the market.
verdicts.bear: No under-ownership left; mega-cap crowding erodes residual alpha vs hidden peers.
